structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Testing/Commissioning Override Switches
structured_payload_candidate.summary: For each Zone Group, provide a set of testing/commissioning software switches that override all zones in the group. When a Zone Group override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the group changes to the same value. Subsequently, zone-level switches may be changed independently; zone-group switch changes only affect zone-level switches when the group switch is changed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning agent changes a Zone Group override switch.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: All zone-level override switches in that group shall change to the same value. Zone-level switches may then be changed independently without affecting the group switch.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that changing a Zone Group override switch updates all zone-level switches accordingly, and that subsequent zone-level changes do not revert the group switch.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the value of a Zone Group’s override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone-level override switch may be changed to a different value.

candidate_entries.evidence_quote: When the value of a Zone Group’s override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone-level override switch may be changed to a different value.
candidate_entries.evidence_text: When the value of a Zone Group’s override switch is changed, the corresponding override switch for every zone in the Zone Group shall change to the same value. Subsequently, the zone-level override switch may be changed to a different value.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Definition and Mode Synchronization
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Each system is divided into Zone Groups (collections of zones served by a single air handler). All zones in a Zone Group must be in the same zone-group operating mode; if one zone enters a mode other than Unoccupied (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy), all zones in that group enter that mode. Occupied-standby is a zonal subset of Occupied Mode and is not a zone-group mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any zone in a Zone Group is placed in a zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: All zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: All zones in each Zone Group shall be in the same zone-group operating mode as defined in Section 5.4.6. If one zone in a Zone Group is placed in any zone-group operating mode other than Unoccupied Mode (due to override, sequence logic, or scheduled occupancy), all zones in that Zone Group shall enter that mode.
